---
title: "I'm Hiroaki Yamato, Student."
about:
  id: heading
  template: solana
  image: "https://ca.slack-edge.com/T070S4AMH26-U08QS3M61S4-959d8de20820-512"
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: e-mail
      href: mailto:koumeiyamato+HP@gmail.com
    - icon: phone
      text: calling
      href: https://lin.ee/wkUj2Xv
---

<div class="tag-navigation">
  <h3>カテゴリー | Categories</h3>
  <a href="tag-startup.html" class="btn btn-primary text-white" style="text-decoration: none;">#起業</a>
  <a href="tag-regional-development.html" class="btn btn-primary text-white" style="text-decoration: none;">#地域創生</a>
  <a href="tag-ai.html" class="btn btn-primary text-white" style="text-decoration: none;">#AI</a>
  <a href="tag-research.html" class="btn btn-primary text-white" style="text-decoration: none;">#研究</a>
  <a href="tag-student-life.html" class="btn btn-primary text-white" style="text-decoration: none;">#学生生活</a>
  <a href="tag-outreach.html" class="btn btn-primary text-white" style="text-decoration: none;">#発信</a>
</div>

:::{#heading}

# 所属に関して|Identification
LLMエンジニア@ , [Arcra](https://arcra.jp/),one of AI starups
大阪市立大学, Osaka Metroporitan University



# News Feed


# Research Interest


# Publication (Featured)



[ᐧᐧᐧ] Please refer to a full list of [Publications](publication.html)  

## MISC



## Awards 

## Talk/Article


## Book/Course


## Resource

## Trajectory of Challenges




## Academic Services
### Organizer
#### Current



## Education & Work Experience

:::
